title: Atmoph Window Yo — BLE API
description: Observed BLE protocol for the Atmoph Window Yo digital window, obtained by passive analysis of BLE traffic between the official smartphone app and a device the user owns. No firmware or app was decompiled; no authentication was bypassed (the device exposes its BLE interface without authentication by design). Fields marked 'observed' are confirmed by capture. Fields marked 'inferred' are strong-but-unverified guesses.

notes: BLE MAC address rotates. Discover by advertised-name substring (typically the 5-digit serial) rather than caching MAC.
No pairing or bonding is required. First-come-first-served single central connection.
The Atmoph smartphone app writes 'C' to the command register on connect. Third-party clients do not need to replicate this; it appears to be an app-level session hello.

command.purpose: General-purpose command register. Accepts variable-length ASCII strings.

power_toggle.note: Always read `power_state` before writing to achieve idempotent on/off.

app_session_hello.effect: Sent by the official app on connect. Effect on third-party clients is unknown and appears optional.

unmapped_bytes.note: The official app writes these bytes during in-app menu navigation (mirroring user taps). Their effect as standalone commands has not been mapped.

power_state.purpose: Current display power state. Subscribe to notify for realtime updates when the user toggles power via proximity sensor or the physical screen.

view_title.example: Evening in Plaza de la Paz
view_title.purpose: Human-readable title of the currently displayed view.

location.purpose: Human-readable location / city name of the currently displayed view.

thumbnail_url.purpose: HTTPS URL to the current view's thumbnail image on atmoph.com. Useful for dashboards and image widgets.

view_id_full.purpose: Internal view identifier with hash suffix. Useful as a stable machine-readable identifier of the current view.

view_id_bare.purpose: Bare internal view identifier (no hash). Write property suggests this may be used to select a specific view directly, but this has not been verified.

device_uuid.purpose: Stable device UUID. Unlike the BLE MAC, this does not rotate. Suitable as a permanent identifier across firmware and reboot cycles.

device_name.purpose: Device display name (mirrors the advertised name).

settings_json.purpose: Aggregated device settings as a single JSON blob. Fields have {min, max, value} triplets where meaningful. Writable, but no third-party write has been verified.

lock_state.purpose: Child-lock state. Writable but not verified for third-party clients.

idempotent_power_on_off.description: Because power_toggle is a toggle rather than an explicit on/off, achieve idempotency by reading power_state first.
steps: If already in desired state, do nothing.

real_time_updates.description: Prefer notifications over polling. Subscribe on connect, keep the connection alive, react to change events.

waking_before_navigation.description: The next_view / prev_view commands appear to require the display to be on. Wake first with power_toggle if power_state is 'false', wait ~1 second, then send the nav command.

constraints.single_central: BLE devices accept a single central connection. Close the official app and any other client before connecting.
constraints.mac_rotation: Do not cache the BLE MAC address as a permanent identifier. Discover by advertised-name substring on every session, or cache the MAC only as an optimisation with a name-scan fallback.
constraints.utf8_multibyte: Some view titles and locations contain non-ASCII UTF-8 characters (e.g. Japanese place names). Decode as UTF-8, not ASCII.

methodology.how_this_was_obtained: Passive analysis of BLE traffic between the official Android Atmoph app and the device, captured using Android's built-in HCI snoop log feature. No decompilation, no firmware inspection, no authentication bypass.
methodology.reference: See docs/communication-analysis.md in the atmoph-window-yo-ble project for the full methodology.

provenance.affiliation: Not affiliated with or endorsed by Atmoph Inc.
